approval_text_required: Approve real PKG-18J-HALLOWEEN-STAMPED-PARENT-INSERTS apply only. Fingerprint: 7383e51d46248ea1f0da306feb03572f7975cca5f651a89ab624d4e6dabf6960. Scope: 22 stamped parent inserts, 22 identity inserts, 22 child printing inserts; finishes normal=22; stamp labels Pikachu Jack-o'-Lantern Stamp=21, Pikachu Pumpkin Stamp=1; sets swsh4=4, swsh2=3, swsh3=3, swsh1=2, swsh10=2, swsh5=2, swsh6=2, swsh9=2, swsh12=1, swsh8=1. No merges. No unsupported cleanup.
